description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a hip roof and a modern yet classic exterior. The facade features a combination of stonework on the lower level and horizontal siding above, with numerous rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious deck area with glass railings, outdoor seating, and a pool or hot tub, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by two palm trees, and features double doors with sidelights. The house includes multiple rooflines and projections, adding architectural interest and complexity. The overall design blends traditional and contemporary elements, making it suitable for upscale suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A large, two-story house with a hip roof, stone and siding exterior, symmetrical windows, and a spacious rear deck with glass railings and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, symmetrical windows, stone base, and two palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive deck with glass railings, outdoor seating, and a pool or hot tub.
description_view_2: Side view displaying multiple roof projections, large windows, and the connection between the main house and deck area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows, stone and siding exterior, and palm trees visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with sidelights, no porch, flanked by palm trees, and a stone base
